author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Joni Award Nominations Open

It's almost time to etch nine winners in the history of Star Atlas forever. 

Nominate your favorite community members, creators and projects for the Joni Awards now until .

Community Member of the Year,Content Creator of the Year,Most Entertaining Star Atlas Video of the Year,Best Educational Video of the Year,Best Community Tool of the Year,Community Helper of the Year,Most Knowledgeable of the Year,Best Star Atlas IP Project of the Year,Best Star Atlas In-game Photo of the Year (The panel will provide these nominations),
 https://forms.gle/pVDViw45BRexdSU89
